Snapping_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "71E0A62C44D1EA4756A3C7BE66528935", "You'll need to build an <Facility>Access Platform</> to get up to your new <Facility>Basic Habitat</>.

Constructions like <Important>Habitats</> and <Important>Platforms</> will <Important>'snap'</> to certain locations on others, like doorways, so that you can <Important>easily connect them together</>.

In this way, you can create an interconnected set of <Important>Habitats</>!

Try hovering the <Important>'ghost'</> of an <Facility>Access Platform</> over the door of your new <Facility>Basic Habitat</> to see this in action.

If you need to move any of your existing <Important>Habitats</> or <Important>Facilities</>, you can use the <Important>Modify</> function of <Important>Build Mode</>.")
